name: Finnhub Stocks
description: Real-time stock quotes, company profiles, news and symbol search via Finnhub (free tier: 60 calls/min).

credentials_required.label: Finnhub API Key
credentials_required.hint: Get your free API key at https://finnhub.io/register — copied from the dashboard after signup. Free tier: 60 calls/minute.

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Current price, daily change, high/low for a stock symbol

tools.name: get_company_profile
tools.description: Company profile (industry, market cap, exchange, logo) for a symbol

tools.name: get_company_news
tools.description: Recent news headlines for a stock symbol

tools.name: search_symbol
tools.description: Find ticker symbols by company name

tools.name: get_market_status
tools.description: Whether a stock exchange is currently open

author: freddy-schuetz
